response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00 - 01:52: Identified as an intro talk segment. 2. 01:52: The song 'きゅる☆ちあ' (Kyu-ru☆Cheer) begins. 3. Used web search to find the official title and lyrics for 'きゅる☆ちあ' by Hololive 3rd Generation. 4. Compiled the full lyrics including call-and-response elements.
response.global_summary: The video features a segment from the Hololive 3rd Generation Live. The first part consists of banter and an introduction by the members. Following this, they perform their original song 'きゅる☆ちあ' (Kyu-ru☆Cheer).

scenes.description: The members of Hololive 3rd Generation are chatting and introducing the segment on stage.
The members perform the song 'きゅる☆ちあ' (Kyu-ru☆Cheer), featuring dancing and call-and-response with the audience.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(ぺこ・まり・のえ・ふれ! 俺の3期!)

あん、超ピチピチ (ahoy!)

きゅるきゅる☆ちあちあ (ちあー! ☆ちあー!) 
フレ! フレ! エルフレ! (ぷれあー!)

hi! ダーリン! (hi! ハニー!)

joy! joy! エンジョイだんちょのノエルだよ (ノエちゃーん)
